title: Modular acetabular prosthesis
abstract: Modular acetabular prosthesis has an acetabular cup having a plurality of exterior slide-in slots recessed within an outer surface of the cup. The cup also has an elongate screw aperture along each slot. The prosthesis also has an augment having an insertion portion. Each slide-in slot is open towards rim of the cup so that the insertion portion can slide into a chosen slot from the rim. The insertion portion has profiled side edges slidably engaging respective profiled inner side edges of the chosen slot so that the insertion portion cannot be pulled outwardly from the slot and so that the augment can be adjustably positioned with respect to the cup along the slot. The insertion portion has a screw aperture collocating with the elongate screw aperture along the slot so that a bone screw can engage the augment through the slot.
claims: Claims Claims 1 . Modular acetabular prosthesis comprising: an acetabular cup comprising a plurality of exterior slide-in slots recessed within an outer surface of the cup and an elongate screw aperture along each slot; and an augment having a insertion portion and wherein each slide-in slot is open towards rim of the cup so that the insertion portion can slide into a chosen slot from the rim, the insertion portion having profiled side edges slidably engaging respective profiled inner side edges of the chosen slot so that the insertion portion cannot be pulled outwardly from the slot and so that the augment can be adjustably positioned with respect to the cup along the slot, and the insertion portion having a screw aperture collocating with the elongate screw aperture along the slot. 2. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein each slide-in slot has a uniform width therealong. 3. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , further comprising a bone screw comprising a head and wherein at least one elongate screw aperture comprises a length greater than twice that of a diameter of the head. 4. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein bone screws with threaded frustoconical locking heads lock simultaneously against countersunk edges of the elongate aperture and a countersunk edge of the screw aperture of the augment. 5. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 4, wherein the countersunk edge of the augment has a narrower cross-section as compared to the countersunk edge of the acetabular cup. 6. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the screw aperture of the augment is elongate. 7. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 6, wherein two bone screws can engage through the screw aperture of the augment. 8. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the augment is a spacer-type augment comprising an outer surface and an inner surface, the inner surface conforming in shape with an outer surface of the cup. 9. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 8, wherein the spacer-type augment comprises an outer osseo-integration material portion defining the outer surface and an inner polymeric material portion defining the inner surface. 10. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 8, wherein the spacer-type augment comprises a further inner surface conforming in shape with an outer surface of a slot. 1 1 . The prosthesis as claimed in claim 8, wherein the spacer-type augment comprises a pair of adjacent insertion portions which can engage adjacent slide-in slots simultaneously. 12. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the augment comprises a flange-type augment comprising a radial plate meeting the insertion portion at an angle and having at least one bone screw aperture therethrough. 13. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 12, wherein the radial plate is of uniform width and comprises a series of bone screw apertures in alignment therealong. 14. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 13, wherein the radial plate widens distally thereof and comprises bone screw apertures adjacent with respect to a longitudinal axis thereof. 15. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 12, wherein the insertion portion extends substantially orthogonally with respect to the radial plate. 16. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 12, wherein an exterior surface of the insertion portion does not extend substantially beyond the outer surface of the cup when the insertion portion is engaged within the chosen slot. 17. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 12, wherein the insertion portion comprises a rounded lower edge and wherein each slot comprises a conforming rounded lower edge. 18. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 12, wherein the insertion portion has curvature conforming to a longitudinal curvature of the exterior surface of the cup. 19. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 12, wherein the flange-type augment is integrally formed from a shaped metal plate wherein a proximal end thereof is bent through substantially 90Â° to form the insertion portion. 20. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 12, wherein an inner surface of the insertion portion comprises a curvature conforming with a longitudinal curvature of an exterior surface of the slot. 21 . The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , further comprising a blanking plate having profiled side edges slidably engaging respective profiled inner side edges of at least one slot. 22. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 21 , wherein an exterior surface of the blanking plate does not extend substantially beyond the outer surface of the cup when the blanking plate is engaged within the at least one slot. 23. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 21 , wherein an edge of the blanking plate does not extend beyond the rim when the blanking plate is engaged within the chosen slot. 24. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 23, wherein the blanking plate defines a rounded lower edge and wherein at least one slot comprises a rounded lower edge. 25. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the prosthesis comprises both a spacer-type augment comprising an outer surface and an inner surface, the inner surface conforming in shape with an outer surface of the cup and a flange-type augment comprising a radial plate meeting the insertion portion at an angle and having at least one bone screw aperture therethrough 26. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 25, wherein the prosthesis is configured so that the spacer-type augment overlaps the flange-type augment when the spacer-type augment and the flange-type augment are attached to adjacent slots of the cup. 27. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 25, wherein the prosthesis is configured so that both augments are attached to the same chosen channel. 28. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the cup comprises a plurality of bone screw apertures orientated for inserting bone screws through the cup parallel with respect to a central axis of the cup. 29. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 28, wherein the bone screw apertures intersect the rim. 15 30. The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the slots encompass approximately half of a periphery of the cup. 31 . The prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the cup comprises a central threaded insertion tool engaging aperture. 32. The method of assembling the prosthesis as claimed in claim 1 , the method comprising sliding insertion portions of a plurality of augments into respective slide-in slots and inserting bone screws through collocating apertures of the cup and augments. 16
